
╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║         🔒 SEALED & LOCKED MASTER PROMPT — MARKETING_CONNECT MODULE            ║
║              EXECUTION_ENGINE = ANTIGRAVITY · PLATFORM = ECOSKILLER            ║
╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝

PROMPT_CLASS          = MARKETING_CONNECT_LOCK
EXECUTION_ENGINE      = ANTIGRAVITY
PARENT_PROMPT         = ECOSKILLER_MASTER_SEALED
SCOPE                 = MARKETING_INTELLIGENCE + GROWTH_CONNECT_LAYER
MUTATION_POLICY       = ADD_ONLY
CREATIVE_INTERPRETATION = FORBIDDEN
ASSUMPTION_FILLING    = FORBIDDEN
DEFAULT_BEHAVIOR      = DENY
FAILURE_MODE          = STOP_EXECUTION
INHERITANCE_MODE      = STRICT (inherits all parent prompt rules without duplication)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🧩 MODULE IDENTITY (NON-NEGOTIABLE)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
MODULE_NAME           = MARKETING_CONNECT
MODULE_TYPE           = GROWTH_ENGINE_LAYER
MODULE_CATEGORY       =
  - Omnichannel Campaign Orchestration
  - Referral & Viral Growth Engine
  - Institutional Partnership Connect
  - Lead Funnel Intelligence
  - Content & SEO Distribution Engine
  - Engagement Retention Layer
  - Analytics & Attribution Engine
  - Brand Trust & Social Proof Engine

PURPOSE =
  Connect all 200 gamification & distribution methods defined in the Ecoskiller
  master prompt into a unified, intelligent, trackable MARKETING EXECUTION LAYER.
  This module does NOT replace the distribution methods — it ORCHESTRATES them
  through a single engine exposed to Antigravity.

PARENT_DEPENDENCY     = ECOSKILLER_MASTER_PROMPT (SEALED)
STAGE_LOCK            = FOLLOWS_FOUR_STAGE_MODEL (Stages 1–4)
TENANT_ISOLATION      = HARD (Each institute / company = isolated marketing namespace)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1️⃣  MODULE BOUNDARY DECLARATION (HARD LOCK)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
MARKETING_CONNECT is a DEDICATED MODULE. It:

✅ ALLOWED:
  - Read user lifecycle events (job applied, skill completed, GD joined)
  - Read gamification triggers (badge earned, belt upgraded, streak hit)
  - Publish to notification service (push, email, in-app)
  - Write to analytics (UTM, funnel, conversion, attribution)
  - Trigger distribution workflows (referral, sharing, content)
  - Interact with Integration Hub (social, email, SMS, webhook)
  - Read public-facing SEO signals (React web layer ONLY)
  - Generate share cards (OG images, story cards, certificates)
  - Coordinate institutional partnership campaigns
  - Power A/B test variants on landing pages (React layer only)

🚫 FORBIDDEN:
  - Writing to user profile data
  - Modifying job, skill, or project records
  - Accessing financial/billing records (delegated to Billing Service)
  - Cross-tenant data exposure
  - Overriding platform RBAC / ABAC rules
  - Sending marketing comms to users who have opted out
  - Implicit targeting of minors without parental consent flag
  - Bypassing unsubscribe compliance (CAN-SPAM / GDPR)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

2️⃣  MARKETING_CONNECT ARCHITECTURE (FIXED)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
MICROSERVICE_NAME     = marketing-connect-service
LANGUAGE              = Go (primary) | Python (ML/analytics submodule)
DB_PRIMARY            = PostgreSQL (marketing schema, tenant-isolated)
DB_CACHE              = Redis (campaign state, rate limits, funnel cache)
EVENT_BUS             = Kafka (subscribe to all platform activity events)
SEARCH               = Elasticsearch (UTM + attribution query layer)
QUEUE                 = BullMQ / Kafka (campaign job dispatch)
INTEGRATION_HUB       = YES (shared Integration Hub — DO NOT reduplicate)

COMMUNICATION_FLOW =
  Platform Activity
      ↓ (Kafka event)
  MARKETING_CONNECT Service
      ↓ (evaluate campaign rules)
  Campaign Rule Engine
      ↓ (dispatch)
  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │  Push Notification   Email    SMS    Social Share   │
  │  Referral Trigger    SEO Tag  Share Card  Webhook   │
  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
      ↓
  Analytics & Attribution Engine
      ↓
  Admin / Tenant Marketing Dashboard

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

3️⃣  CORE SUB-ENGINES (ALL REQUIRED)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

A. CAMPAIGN ORCHESTRATION ENGINE
─────────────────────────────────
  - Campaign CRUD (title, type, audience, schedule, budget=$0 or paid)
  - Trigger types:
      EVENT_TRIGGER    → Kafka event (e.g. "user.badge.earned")
      SCHEDULE_TRIGGER → Cron job (e.g. weekly digest every Monday 9AM)
      BEHAVIORAL_TRIGGER → User inactivity, drop-off, milestone
      MANUAL_TRIGGER   → Admin-initiated batch
  - Audience segmentation rules:
      Role-based (Students / Trainers / Recruiters / Institutes)
      Domain-based (Tech / Arts / Commerce / Science / Admin)
      Lifecycle-based (New / Active / Dormant / Churned)
      Gamification-based (Belt level / Streak / Points tier)
  - Campaign states: DRAFT → REVIEW → APPROVED → RUNNING → PAUSED → COMPLETED
  - Campaign isolation: tenant_id HARD enforced on all records

DB Tables:
  campaigns(id, tenant_id, type, trigger_type, audience_rule, status, created_at)
  campaign_audience(campaign_id, user_id, segment_label)
  campaign_logs(campaign_id, user_id, channel, sent_at, opened_at, clicked_at)

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

B. REFERRAL & VIRAL GROWTH ENGINE
───────────────────────────────────
  - Referral code generation (unique per user, tenant-namespaced)
  - Referral tracking: click → signup → activation → reward
  - Reward dispatch → delegates to Gamification Service (points/badge)
  - Anti-spam: referred user must complete 1 activity before reward triggers
  - Viral mechanics supported:
      Invite-to-Unlock gating
      Group signup bonuses
      Campus leaderboard challenges
      "Peer Challenge" viral loops
  - Social proof notifications:
      "Rahul from IIT Delhi just joined via your link!"
  - Referral states: PENDING → ACTIVATED → REWARDED | EXPIRED | FRAUD_FLAGGED

DB Tables:
  referral_codes(code, user_id, tenant_id, created_at, expiry)
  referrals(id, referrer_id, referee_id, code, status, rewarded_at)
  referral_fraud_log(referral_id, reason, flagged_at)

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

C. SHARE CARD & SOCIAL PROOF ENGINE
─────────────────────────────────────
  - Triggers: badge earned, belt upgraded, project completed, GD won, job placed
  - Auto-generates OG-compliant share cards:
      LinkedIn card (1200×627px)
      Instagram Story card (1080×1920px)
      Twitter/X card (1200×675px)
      WhatsApp preview card
  - Card contents:
      User display name (no PII beyond what user consented to share)
      Achievement label
      Platform branding (tenant-customizable logo zone)
      UTM-tagged deep link
  - Share destination options:
      LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Instagram, WhatsApp, Email, Copy Link
  - PRIVACY RULE: User must explicitly tap "Share" — auto-posting is FORBIDDEN
  - Image generation: Canvas API (Flutter) / Sharp (Node.js for React OG)

DB Tables:
  share_cards(id, user_id, trigger_event, card_url, shared_to, shared_at)
  share_clicks(card_id, clicked_by, clicked_at, utm_source)

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

D. CONTENT & SEO DISTRIBUTION ENGINE
──────────────────────────────────────
  SEO scope = React Web Layer ONLY (Flutter apps DO NOT index — HARD RULE)

  - Dynamic meta tag generation per entity:
      Job postings → SEO-optimized title + description
      User public profiles → schema.org/Person structured data
      Skill courses → schema.org/Course
      Project case studies → schema.org/CreativeWork
  - Sitemap auto-generation (submitted to Google Search Console)
  - Blog/content pipeline:
      CMS integration (headless, e.g. Strapi or Contentful)
      Keyword mapping per domain track (Tech / Commerce / Arts etc.)
      Publish schedule management
      Internal linking graph
  - Open Graph + Twitter Card metadata on all public-facing pages
  - Canonical URL enforcement (no duplicate content across tenants)
  - Content performance dashboard: impressions, CTR, ranking positions

DB Tables:
  seo_entities(entity_type, entity_id, meta_title, meta_desc, og_image, updated_at)
  content_posts(id, slug, title, meta, published_at, views, conversions)
  sitemap_index(entity_type, entity_id, last_modified, priority)

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

E. INSTITUTIONAL PARTNERSHIP CONNECT
──────────────────────────────────────
  - Dedicated partnership objects:
      PARTNER_TYPE = College | Corporate | Bootcamp | Government | Association
  - Partnership lifecycle: PROSPECT → OUTREACH → PILOT → ACTIVE → STRATEGIC
  - TPO (Training & Placement Officer) Dashboard:
      Cohort performance metrics
      Hiring readiness scores
      Placement conversion tracking
  - Campus Ambassador Program:
      Application + approval workflow
      Referral code + incentive tracking
      Leaderboard (per campus)
      Monthly prize dispatch trigger
  - Bulk enrollment links (partner-specific UTM + tenant subdomain)
  - Co-branded landing page support (React layer, tenant-controlled)
  - Partnership health score (auto-calculated from activity volume)

DB Tables:
  partners(id, name, type, tier, status, created_at)
  partner_campaigns(partner_id, campaign_id, co_brand_assets, tracking_code)
  campus_ambassadors(user_id, partner_id, referral_code, status, points_earned)
  tpo_dashboard_config(partner_id, enabled_widgets, report_frequency)

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

F. LEAD FUNNEL INTELLIGENCE ENGINE
────────────────────────────────────
  FUNNEL_STAGES =
    DISCOVERY → SIGNUP → ONBOARDING → ACTIVATION → HABIT → REFERRAL → ADVOCATE

  - Stage detection: event-driven, real-time via Kafka
  - Drop-off detection per stage (configurable thresholds)
  - Automated re-engagement triggers on drop-off:
      24h → in-app nudge
      48h → push notification
      72h → email
      7d  → SMS (if opted-in)
      14d → "We miss you" campaign
  - Conversion attribution:
      UTM source / medium / campaign / term / content
      First-touch + Last-touch + Linear models supported
      Channel-level ROI calculation
  - Funnel visualization dashboard (Admin + Tenant)
  - A/B test support on onboarding flows (React web layer ONLY)

DB Tables:
  funnel_events(user_id, stage, event_name, utm_data, occurred_at)
  attribution_log(user_id, channel, model, attributed_conversion, value)
  ab_tests(id, name, variant_a, variant_b, traffic_split, winner, concluded_at)
  reengagement_log(user_id, trigger_stage, channel, sent_at, result)

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

G. NOTIFICATION ORCHESTRATION LAYER
─────────────────────────────────────
  CHANNELS = IN_APP | PUSH | EMAIL | SMS | WEBHOOK

  Priority cascade:
    CRITICAL → All channels simultaneously (e.g. compliance alert)
    HIGH     → Push + Email
    MEDIUM   → Push OR Email (user preference)
    LOW      → In-app only

  - Template engine: Handlebars / Jinja2 (locale-aware, RTL-safe)
  - Per-user notification preferences (respected ALWAYS)
  - Opt-out enforced at send-time (not just preference-save time)
  - Frequency capping:
      Max 3 marketing notifications/day/user
      Max 1 email/day (marketing category)
      No SMS unless user explicitly opted in
  - Notification categories:
      TRANSACTIONAL (always sent, cannot opt out)
      MARKETING (opt-in required)
      GAMIFICATION (opt-in default, can opt out)
      INSTITUTIONAL (from partner, opt-in required separately)
  - Compliance: CAN-SPAM, GDPR, DPDP Act (India) — ALL enforced

DB Tables:
  notification_preferences(user_id, category, channel, opted_in, updated_at)
  notification_log(id, user_id, category, channel, template_id, sent_at, status)
  frequency_caps(user_id, category, count_today, reset_at)
  unsubscribe_log(user_id, category, unsubscribed_at, reason)

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

H. ANALYTICS & ATTRIBUTION DASHBOARD
──────────────────────────────────────
  DASHBOARDS =
    Platform Admin   → Full cross-tenant marketing overview
    Tenant Admin     → Own tenant marketing performance
    Partner (TPO)    → Campus-specific funnel + placement metrics
    Recruiter        → Reach, JD performance, application funnel

  METRICS =
    - User acquisition by channel (UTM attribution)
    - Referral conversion rate by tier (Student / Institute / Corporate)
    - Campaign open rate, CTR, conversion rate
    - Share card click-through rate by platform
    - SEO: impressions, rank, CTR, organic signups
    - Funnel drop-off rates by stage
    - Re-engagement recovery rate
    - Institutional partner ROI (students placed / students enrolled)
    - A/B test statistical significance reporting
    - NPS score trend (monthly, per role segment)

  TOOLING =
    PROMETHEUS   → metrics collection
    GRAFANA      → internal dashboards
    CUSTOM_DASH  → tenant-facing React dashboard (read-only)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

4️⃣  DISTRIBUTION METHOD CONNECTIVITY MAP (LOCKED)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
All 200 distribution methods from the master prompt are orchestrated by
MARKETING_CONNECT as follows:

ORGANIC CONTENT & SEO (#101–#120)
  Handled by: Content & SEO Distribution Engine (Sub-engine D)
  Trigger: CMS publish event → auto-SEO tag → sitemap push

INSTITUTIONAL PARTNERSHIPS (#121–#140)
  Handled by: Institutional Partnership Connect (Sub-engine E)
  Trigger: Partner status change → campaign auto-activate

REFERRAL & VIRAL (#141–#160)
  Handled by: Referral & Viral Growth Engine (Sub-engine B)
             + Share Card Engine (Sub-engine C)
  Trigger: Gamification event → referral reward → share card

DEVELOPER CHANNELS (#161–#170)
  Handled by: Content & SEO Engine (Sub-engine D) + Integration Hub
  Trigger: Open-source repo activity → UTM-tracked → funnel entry

OFFLINE & COMMUNITY (#171–#180)
  Handled by: Campaign Orchestration Engine (Sub-engine A)
  QR Code generation: UUID-linked, tenant-namespaced, scannable offline

STRATEGIC / LONG-TAIL (#181–#200)
  Handled by: Lead Funnel Intelligence Engine (Sub-engine F)
             + Notification Orchestration Layer (Sub-engine G)
  Trigger: Behavioral stage detection → targeted campaign dispatch

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

5️⃣  STAGE ROLLOUT (SEQUENTIAL — SKIPPING = INVALID)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

STAGE 1 — FOUNDATION MARKETING CONNECT
  ✅ Referral code system (basic)
  ✅ UTM tracking + attribution schema
  ✅ Notification preferences + opt-out compliance
  ✅ Share card generator (static templates)
  ✅ Campaign CRUD (manual trigger only)
  ✅ Basic funnel event capture

STAGE 2 — INTELLIGENCE MARKETING CONNECT
  ✅ AI-powered audience segmentation
  ✅ Drop-off prediction + automated re-engagement
  ✅ A/B test framework (React web layer)
  ✅ Attribution model engine (first-touch / last-touch / linear)
  ✅ Referral fraud detection ML model
  ✅ Campaign performance scoring

STAGE 3 — ECOSYSTEM MARKETING CONNECT
  ✅ Institutional Partnership Dashboard (TPO, Corporate, Bootcamp)
  ✅ Campus Ambassador program full workflow
  ✅ Co-branded landing page engine
  ✅ Partner-specific campaign templates
  ✅ Community event marketing (webinars, GD battles, hackathons)
  ✅ Viral share loop integrations (WhatsApp, LinkedIn, Instagram)

STAGE 4 — COMPLIANCE & SCALE MARKETING CONNECT
  ✅ Full GDPR / CAN-SPAM / DPDP audit log
  ✅ Consent versioning (per campaign, per user)
  ✅ Multi-tenant marketing isolation audit
  ✅ Penetration test of notification delivery paths
  ✅ Marketing governance dashboard (platform admin)
  ✅ Public platform health marketing metrics (status.ecoskiller.com)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

6️⃣  MARKETING_CONNECT UI (ANTIGRAVITY GENERATION RULES)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
UI_TARGET            = Flutter (primary) | React Next.js (admin web panel)
UI_DESIGN_LANGUAGE   = INHERITS MASTER PROMPT (CLEAN | SOLID | FUNCTION-FIRST)
DECORATIVE_UI        = FORBIDDEN

MARKETING_CONNECT exposes the following UI surfaces:

ROLE: Platform Admin
  → Full marketing analytics dashboard
  → Campaign management (all tenants, read mode)
  → Compliance & consent audit UI
  → Partner directory

ROLE: Tenant Admin
  → Own tenant campaign builder
  → Referral performance board
  → Share card preview & dispatch
  → Partner onboarding flow
  → Notification template editor

ROLE: Student
  → Referral link + code screen
  → "Share my achievement" card trigger
  → Notification preference center
  → "My referrals" tracker

ROLE: Recruiter
  → Job posting performance (applications, views, funnel)
  → Employer branding assets (co-branded cards)

ROLE: Campus Ambassador
  → Personal referral dashboard
  → Leaderboard rank (campus-scoped)
  → Reward status

ROLE: Partner (TPO / Corporate HR)
  → Cohort funnel metrics
  → Campaign performance for their institution
  → Bulk enrollment link generator

UI GENERATION COMMAND FORMAT:
  GENERATE_UI
  ROLE     = [see above roles]
  MODULE   = MARKETING_CONNECT
  SCREEN   = [Campaign_Builder | Referral_Dashboard | Share_Card | 
               Analytics | Partner_Dashboard | Notification_Prefs | 
               Funnel_View | AB_Test_Manager | Compliance_Audit]
  STAGE    = [FOUNDATION | INTELLIGENCE | ECOSYSTEM | COMPLIANCE]

  Exceeding 15 screens per run = STOP EXECUTION
  Mixing roles per run = FORBIDDEN

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

7️⃣  COMPLIANCE RULES (INHERITED + MARKETING-SPECIFIC)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

INHERITED (DO NOT DUPLICATE FROM PARENT PROMPT):
  RBAC + ABAC, MFA, Session Management, Audit Immutability,
  Tenant Isolation, Encryption at Rest, Domain Isolation

MARKETING-SPECIFIC (THIS MODULE ONLY):
  GDPR_COMPLIANCE          = ENABLED (EU users)
  CAN_SPAM_COMPLIANCE      = ENABLED (all email)
  DPDP_ACT_COMPLIANCE      = ENABLED (India users — Digital Personal Data Protection Act)
  CONSENT_VERSIONING       = REQUIRED (store version ID at consent time)
  CONSENT_WITHDRAWAL       = IMMEDIATE (no queued sends after opt-out)
  MINOR_PROTECTION         = STRICT (no marketing to users flagged as minor)
  DATA_MINIMIZATION        = ENFORCE (marketing only sees what it needs)
  RIGHT_TO_FORGET_HOOK     = CONNECTED (purge marketing data on user deletion)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

8️⃣  ABSOLUTE PROHIBITIONS (MARKETING_CONNECT)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🚫 No dark patterns in notification or referral UI
🚫 No pre-checked opt-in boxes
🚫 No marketing to opted-out users under any campaign type
🚫 No cross-tenant audience mixing
🚫 No auto-posting to social on user's behalf without explicit action
🚫 No collecting engagement metrics on minors without guardian consent
🚫 No use of AI to generate persuasive content targeting individual psychology
🚫 No campaign that mimics transactional messages to bypass opt-out
🚫 No affiliate / paid placement without disclosure label in UI
🚫 No lead data sale to third parties — EVER

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

9️⃣  INTEGRATION DEPENDENCY MAP (READ-ONLY — DO NOT REBUILD)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
MARKETING_CONNECT consumes (does NOT own) the following services:

  User Service           → profile, role, lifecycle state, opt-out flags
  Auth Service           → session validity (before any campaign action)
  Gamification Service   → badge/belt/point events (Kafka subscriptions)
  Notification Service   → shared delivery channel (push/email/SMS/in-app)
  Integration Hub        → social platform adapters (LinkedIn, WhatsApp, etc.)
  Analytics Service      → read placement probability, skill gap scores
  Billing Service        → premium tier check (before unlocking paid features)
  Admin Governance Svc   → campaign approval workflow, compliance audit
  LiveKit                → webinar event triggers for marketing campaigns

  Each integration = READ or EVENT_SUBSCRIBE only.
  MARKETING_CONNECT does NOT write into any of the above service DBs.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔟  MARKETING_CONNECT PERFORMANCE REQUIREMENTS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Campaign rule evaluation          < 200ms (P95)
Share card generation             < 1.5s
Push notification dispatch        < 500ms from trigger event
Email batch dispatch              < 5min per 100k recipients
Referral attribution resolution   < 100ms
Analytics dashboard load          < 2s (cached, 5min TTL)
Funnel stage detection latency    < 1s from event receipt

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

▶️  HOW ANTIGRAVITY USES THIS MODULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
1️⃣  Paste the ECOSKILLER MASTER SEALED PROMPT once (already done)
2️⃣  Paste this MARKETING_CONNECT SEALED PROMPT once — this locks the module
3️⃣  Issue targeted generation commands, example:

    GENERATE_BACKEND
    MODULE        = MARKETING_CONNECT
    SUB_ENGINE    = REFERRAL_VIRAL_ENGINE
    STAGE         = FOUNDATION
    ENTITY_STATE  = REFERRAL.PENDING

    GENERATE_UI
    ROLE          = Student
    MODULE        = MARKETING_CONNECT
    SCREEN        = Referral_Dashboard
    STAGE         = FOUNDATION

4️⃣  Never regenerate this sealed prompt — APPEND ONLY if gaps found
5️⃣  Each run = 1 sub-engine OR 1 screen set. Mixed runs = INVALID

⚠️  Antigravity must NOT reinterpret marketing campaign logic,
    audience rules, or compliance obligations from this prompt.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║                           🔐 FINAL SEAL                                        ║
║                                                                                ║
║   THIS PROMPT IS:                                                              ║
║   ✔  LOCKED                                                                    ║
║   ✔  SEALED                                                                    ║
║   ✔  DETERMINISTIC                                                             ║
║   ✔  ENTERPRISE SAFE                                                           ║
║   ✔  COMPLIANCE ENFORCED (GDPR · CAN-SPAM · DPDP)                             ║
║   ✔  ANTIGRAVITY COMPATIBLE                                                    ║
║   ✔  TENANT ISOLATED                                                           ║
║   ✔  PARENT PROMPT INHERITED (NO DUPLICATION)                                 ║
║                                                                                ║
║   MODULE        = MARKETING_CONNECT                                            ║
║   ENGINE        = ANTIGRAVITY                                                  ║
║   PLATFORM      = ECOSKILLER                                                   ║
║   VERSION       = 1.0.0                                                        ║
║   CHANGE_POLICY = APPEND_ONLY · ARCHITECT_APPROVAL_REQUIRED                   ║
║                                                                                ║
║              ANY DEVIATION = STOP EXECUTION                                    ║
╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
